penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the maximum time limit. Multiple segments of the circle remain connected.

reasoning: The video shows clear evidence of cutting activity around the marked circle with good visibility throughout. However, the circle cutting was not completed within the 300-second maximum time limit, resulting in an incomplete task. The final frame shows the circle is not fully freed from the surrounding gauze with multiple connection points remaining. This constitutes an automatic zero score due to incomplete task penalty.
